name: Active / InactiveTouristAccount
description: Enable or disable the account of a tourist.
preconditions: The Agency is in the form of a tourist.
postconditions: Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.

steps: Activate the feature for the activation / deactivation by a given sheet tourist.
Asks for confirmation of activation / deactivation.
Enable / disable the account of the visitor you selected.
